headline_seed: One of Spain's deadliest wildfires kills at least 12 people, with 23 others missing - NPR
draft_text:
At least 12 dead, 23 missing after a wildfire in Almeria, Spain — one of the country's deadliest on record. The Guardian and NPR report most victims were foreign nationals who fled instead of sheltering in place.

And that's the mews.
